name: G1 Dungeon — Non-Natural Areas Wandering (1-in-12)
description: Wandering monster table for all non-natural areas of the G1 dungeon level. Encounter frequency: 1 in 12. Roll 1d12; on a 1, roll 1d3 on this table. For natural areas (Rooms 19–21): check 1 in 20; in 19–20, 1d4 subterranean lizards from area 21; in 21, 1d3 carrion crawlers coming up from the sinkholes.

results.text: The Keeper and his pet (from Room 2) out inspecting
12 orcs (hp 7 each), two with heavy crossbows with poisoned bolts (Dmg 2–5 + poison), out raiding for food
